domain: workshop fixtures and small machine-shop accessories

ideas.product_context: Used on a milling machine vise to hold small round stock or tubing without raising the workpiece too high above the jaws.
ideas.core_function: Provides a centered V-groove contact surface and clamp relief features so cylindrical work can be gripped repeatably.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hardened rectangular vise jaw insert with machined V-groove, counterbored mounting holes, and edge chamfers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines prismatic jaw geometry with angled groove faces, hole placement, symmetry, relief cuts, and chamfered working edges.

ideas.idea_title: Adjustable Drill Press Depth Stop Collar
ideas.product_context: Accessory fitted around a drill press quill or stop rod for quickly setting repeatable drilling depth in a small workshop.
ideas.core_function: Locks at a chosen height and provides a positive mechanical stop for repeated hole depths.
ideas.likely_main_part: Split cylindrical collar with clamp screw boss, radial slot, bored center hole, and knurled or faceted grip rim.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires accurate cylindrical modeling, split clamp features, screw clearance, boss integration, and small ergonomic surface details.

ideas.product_context: A replacement toe piece for a milling table step-clamp set used to press down on irregular workpieces.
ideas.core_function: Transfers clamping force from a strap clamp onto the workpiece while allowing height adjustment from the stepped rear surface.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp toe with serrated step profile, radiused contact nose, elongated bolt slot, and hardened bearing pad.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests stepped geometry, elongated slots, angled contact surfaces, serrations, fillets, and load-bearing proportions.

ideas.product_context: Mounts a dial indicator to a small engine lathe carriage for measuring travel or setting repeatable stops.
ideas.core_function: Positions an indicator stem rigidly near the work axis while allowing fine orientation adjustment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Compact machined arm with dovetail or clamp mount, indicator stem bore, pinch slot, and screw boss.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Involves intersecting bores, clamp slots, compact offset arms, functional clearances, and orientation-critical reference faces.

ideas.product_context: Insert sleeve used in a lathe quick-change tool holder to adapt smaller boring bars to a larger holder bore.
ideas.core_function: Centers and supports a boring bar while giving set screws flat bearing surfaces and preventing rotation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Precision cylindrical sleeve with through bore, external flat, split relief slit, and set-screw dimples.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric cylindrical features, thin-wall part representation, flats on round stock, slots, and small localized contact pockets.

ideas.product_context: Small shop accessory used to keep matched parallels paired and upright in a vise drawer or setup tray.
ideas.core_function: Holds two parallels together at their ends without damaging precision ground faces.
ideas.likely_main_part: Spring-style U-shaped machined clip with relief grooves, finger tab, and soft-contact inner pads or pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires thin-section geometry, internal clearances, rounded transitions, contact pockets, and nontrivial open U-shaped topology.

ideas.idea_title: Bench Grinder Tool Rest Angle Block
ideas.product_context: Fixture used on a bench grinder tool rest to quickly set a repeatable sharpening angle for lathe tools or drill bits.
ideas.core_function: Provides a fixed angled reference surface that registers against the grinder rest and supports the tool at a known angle.
ideas.likely_main_part: Triangular or wedge-shaped machined block with stop lip, clamping slot, angle-engraving recess, and relieved underside.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests angled datum surfaces, wedge geometry, slots through sloped faces, small reference lips, and text or marking recess placement.

ideas.product_context: Used to locate a workpiece or vise over the center bore of a small rotary table during milling setups.
ideas.core_function: Fits into the rotary table center hole and presents a raised pilot diameter for aligning fixtures.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped cylindrical plug with taper lead-in, shoulder flange, threaded puller hole, and wrench flats.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines coaxial steps, taper transitions, shoulder references, internal threading representation, and flats intersecting cylindrical bodies.

ideas.idea_title: Vise Jaw Stop With Sliding Finger
ideas.product_context: Milling vise accessory that lets a machinist repeatedly position short workpieces against the same side reference.
ideas.core_function: Clamps to a vise jaw and presents an adjustable stop finger that can be set beside the cutting area.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined clamp body with jaw-grip hook, dovetail or slot for sliding finger, clamp screw bore, and stop face.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests nested functional features, clamping hooks, sliding interfaces, perpendicular stop faces, screw bosses, and compact assembly-oriented geometry.

ideas.idea_title: Tap Guide Block With Interchangeable Bushings
ideas.product_context: Hand-tapping aid used on a drill press table or bench to keep taps square to a drilled hole.
ideas.core_function: Guides a tap vertically through a close-fitting bushing while the block sits flat on the workpiece.
ideas.likely_main_part: Rectangular guide block with central counterbored bushing pocket, clearance window, side retention screw, and underside relief.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires precise stacked bores, counterbores, replaceable insert pockets, side fastener geometry, flatness-critical base features, and clearance cutouts.
